settings.title: Santorini Wine Tasting
settings.summary: An afternoon through three cliff-top wineries tasting Assyrtiko and Vinsanto from volcanic vines.
settings.description:
Santorini's vines grow in woven baskets close to the ground, coaxing crisp, mineral whites from black volcanic soil and almost no rain. We visit three family wineries along the caldera, each with its own view and cellar.

A sommelier walks us through twelve pours — from steely Assyrtiko to sun-dried Vinsanto — paired with local cheese, capers and tomato keftedes, finishing as the light turns gold over the vineyards.
settings.itinerary:
15:00 · Pickup | Air-conditioned transfer from the resort
15:30 · First winery | Assyrtiko tasting with caldera views
17:00 · Second winery | Cellar tour and barrel tasting
18:30 · Third winery | Vinsanto and mezze at sunset
settings.rates:
Per person | €95
Non-drinker | €55
Private group (up to 6) | €520
settings.rates_note: Includes 12 tastings and food pairings. Guests must be 18+ to taste. Minimum 2 guests to confirm.
settings.seo_description: A guided Santorini wine tour through three cliff-top wineries tasting Assyrtiko and Vinsanto.
